step_by_step_reasoning: We first identify the ingestion layer consisting of AWS IoT Core connected to 40 mills and 20 apps. This data splits into two distinct paths: a top path representing OEE/job telemetry and a bottom path for additional machine metrics. Both paths feed into SQS queues, processed by Lambdas, and written to DynamoDB tables. There is an external Kafka (MSK) pipeline that also feeds the top DynamoDB via Lambda. For evaluations, an S3 bucket triggers a Lambda which aggregates data into the main Statistics DynamoDB. For the dashboard interface, Cognito and API Gateway connect to a Lambda backend. On the right, SNS and SES handle alerting, while a bottom-right Lambda/DynamoDB setup manages the ticketing and self-healing orchestration.

graph.name: Glidewell Dental IoT and Statistical Analytics Architecture
graph.notes: Real-time manufacturing analytics and self-healing orchestration platform. Scales to process over 1 million telemetry messages daily from smart milling devices.

nodes.name: Milling Machines & Apps
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: 40 milling machines and 20 client applications generating telemetry.

nodes.name: AWS IoT Core
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Central broker managing active device connections.

nodes.name: Metadata DB
nodes.notes: Stores structural metadata about milling jobs.

nodes.name: Amazon MSK
nodes.notes: Kafka stream broker processing upstream manufacturing data.

nodes.name: Kafka Stream Consumer
nodes.notes: Consumes stream records from Apache Kafka.

nodes.name: Job Queue
nodes.notes: Buffers job records and scheduling details.

nodes.name: Job Queue Processor
nodes.notes: Processes and validates incoming milling jobs.

nodes.name: Jobs DB
nodes.notes: Stores validated transaction histories for jobs.

nodes.name: OEE Queue
nodes.notes: Buffers Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) metrics.

nodes.name: OEE Processor
nodes.notes: Processes raw machine state and execution timelines.

nodes.name: OEE DB
nodes.notes: Stores raw machine state history.

nodes.name: Dentist Evaluations
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Stores clinical diagnostic evaluations and quality metrics.

nodes.name: Statistical Aggregator
nodes.notes: Aggregates performance statistics from clinical files and storage.

nodes.name: Statistics DB
nodes.notes: Acts as the single source of truth for manufacturing quality trends.

nodes.name: Team Notifications
nodes.notes: Sends real-time team alerts to Teams and chat services.

nodes.name: Email Notifications
nodes.notes: Dispatches operational escalation emails to supervisors.

nodes.name: Dashboard Auth
nodes.notes: Secures executive monitoring applications.

nodes.name: Dashboard API
nodes.notes: Exposes endpoints for the operational UI.

nodes.name: Dashboard Backend
nodes.notes: Retrieves statistical aggregates for visualization.

nodes.name: Ticketing DB
nodes.notes: Tracks maintenance ticket statuses and state.

nodes.name: Self-Healing Controller
nodes.notes: Orchestrates machine calibration blocks and maintenance schedules.

edges.notes: Triggers parsing on new clinical files.
